title: HVAC Services
lede: Comprehensive heating, ventilation, and air conditioning service for commercial and industrial facilities — from emergency repair on a rooftop unit at 2 a.m. to a full chiller plant overhaul.
metaDescription: Commercial HVAC service from STR Mechanical — rooftop units, chillers, boilers, VRF, and air handlers across NC, VA, and SC.
featuresHeading: Every system in the mechanical room.
featuresLead: Our techs work on the full breadth of commercial HVAC equipment — packaged units, split systems, central plants, and the controls that tie them together.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 21V9"/></svg>
features.title: Rooftop units
features.body: Service, repair, and replacement for packaged RTUs — gas-electric, heat pump, and dedicated outside air units.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M12 7v5l3 3"/></svg>
features.title: Chillers & cooling towers
features.body: Air-cooled, water-cooled, and absorption chillers — start-up, teardown, eddy-current tube testing, refrigerant management.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2v4M12 18v4M4.93 4.93l2.83 2.83M16.24 16.24l2.83 2.83M2 12h4M18 12h4"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/></svg>
features.title: Boilers & hot water
features.body: Hot water and steam boilers, condensate systems, combustion analysis and tuning, and code-required annual inspections.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 12h20M12 2v20"/><rect x="6" y="6" width="12" height="12" rx="1"/></svg>
features.title: Air handlers & DOAS
features.body: AHUs, fan coils, VAV boxes, and dedicated outside air units — coil cleaning, motor and bearing replacement, balance, controls integration.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></svg>
features.title: VRF / VRV systems
features.body: Multi-zone variable refrigerant systems — leak detection, EEPROM diagnostics, indoor-unit replacement, condenser service.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 12c0-4 4-7 9-7s9 3 9 7-4 7-9 7c-2 0-4-.5-5.5-1.5L3 19l1.5-3.5C3.5 14.5 3 13.3 3 12z"/></svg>
features.title: Indoor air quality
features.body: Filtration upgrades, UV-C, bipolar ionization, humidity control, ventilation surveys, and ASHRAE 62.1 compliance audits.

whyHeading: We service what we install — and we install what we service.
whyParagraphs: Most HVAC firms split into install crews and service crews that don't talk. Ours don't. The tech who shows up to fix your rooftop unit at 2 a.m. has probably worked on the install crew that put it there.
That means faster diagnosis, cleaner repairs, and a service record that actually reflects what's in your building.
whyBullets: Factory-trained on Trane, Carrier, Daikin, JCI, Lennox, Mitsubishi, and LG
EPA-certified universal techs on every truck
Manufacturer warranty handling — we file the paperwork, you don't
Aligned with your in-house facilities team, not in competition with them
Same crew for service and projects — no handoff friction
ctaParagraph: Tell us about your facility — current equipment, pain points, expansion plans — and we'll come back with a proposal within a week.
